disclaimer: Important: All transaction and confirmation processes are only conducted through the Official Admin WhatsApp. Please read the following points carefully for mutual convenience.

groups.title: Booking Process
items: Check the current field schedule on the Borneo Anfield Stadium Online Schedule: http://borneoanfieldstadium.com/jadwalonline
Confirm and book available field schedules with the Admin via WhatsApp (Operational hours: 09:00 - 23:00 WITA).
Complete the booking form (Booker identity and schedule) provided by the Admin.
After the down payment is received, the Admin will input your team name into the online schedule.
The team only needs to come to BAS and play directly on the scheduled day after full payment is completed.

groups.title: Payment Terms
items: Wait for the Admin to calculate the total cost before making payment. You have 30 minutes to pay a 50% down payment.
Payments made beyond the 30-minute limit without confirmation risk the schedule being taken by another party.
Payments must be made during operational hours (09:00 - 23:00 WITA).
On D-4 the Admin will remind you for settlement. On D-3 the booking MUST be fully paid.

If not fully paid by D-3, the booking is considered CANCELLED. Any payment made will be converted into a deposit for the next booking (not forfeited, but must be used for full payment on the next booking).
Ensure the transfer amount is correct. Any transfer discrepancy (overpayment) will automatically be recorded as a deposit and cannot be refunded.

groups.title: Policy & Cancellation
items: There are no refunds and bookings that have been paid cannot be cancelled.
Rescheduling must be informed no later than D-7 and is only allowed once.
Field selection (A or B) is determined by management. Both have identical size and quality.
For late-night hours (23:00 - 02:00 WITA), please maintain quietness. Management reserves the right to stop the game in case of excessive disturbance.

groups.title: Weather Conditions (Force Majeure)
items: If heavy rain causes flooding or makes access impossible, the schedule may be rescheduled.
If there is lightning, the schedule will be delayed by 15–30 minutes. If play has already started, the time will be extended according to the delay duration after the rain stops.
The field is always ready for use. Bookings cannot be cancelled unilaterally due to normal rain.
